creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  Upgrade games/bsdgames from v5.2.2 to v5.5.0

  Update to DragonflyBSD 5.5.0 sources.
  Pulled sail from NetBSD, since it wasn't working.
  Remake patches
